headline: DRC rotation re-confirm with mixed in-window evidence. HRW April 14 documented warring parties blocking aid deliveries and stopping civilians from fleeing in South Kivu Highlands; aid agencies have suspended operations after staff killed in ambushes; M23/Twirwaneho cluster active. Mitigating positive: April 19 DRC government and M23 rebels committed in Switzerland talks to protecting civilians and easing aid deliveries — modest BND-trajectory signal that has not yet translated into operational improvement. UNSC met April 15. Composite at low Critical band; small uplift not warranted given operational reality on the ground; sub-threshold confirmation.
key_evidence: April 14 2026: HRW documented warring parties blocking aid deliveries and stopping civilians from fleeing in South Kivu Highlands.
Humanitarian organizations have suspended operations in large parts of South Kivu after staff killed in ambushes and vehicles seized.
Burundian army deploying ~4,000 troops to Fizi and Mwenga territories to fight alongside Congolese armed forces against Twirwaneho/M23.
April 15 2026: UN Security Council met on DRC; called to facilitate humanitarian aid delivery and consider new sanctions on abusive commanders.
April 19 2026: DRC government and M23 rebels committed (after Switzerland talks) to protecting civilians and easing aid deliveries — POSITIVE in-window trajectory signal.
Doha peace framework signed but most key provisions unresolved.
7+ million internally displaced (UN); displacement crisis continuing.

evidence.finding: Aid and movements hindered in South Kivu Highlands; warring parties blocking aid; civilians trapped.
DRC government and M23 rebels commit to protecting civilians and aid deliveries after Switzerland talks.

evidence.source: Critical Threats Congo War Security Review April 15 2026
evidence.finding: Active conflict assessment; UNSC meeting April 15; sanctions consideration.
Peace monitoring agreement framework discussed in Switzerland.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 1.2 (+0.075). HRW documentation captures suffering at sector level; minor uplift for HRW external-audit pattern reaching public domain.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 1.2 (+0.075). Marginal uplift for Switzerland-talks engagement of civilian protection; minimal operational evidence.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 1.3 (+0.05). UNSC engagement; civilian-protection commitment is talk-level, not yet operational.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 1.1 (+0.1). EQ2 Priority for Vulnerable: Switzerland-talks specifically named civilian protection.
scoring_rationale.BND: 1.3 (+0.05). B3 Scope Clarity: Switzerland-talks commitment is a talk-level scope-narrowing signal that may translate to operational structure.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 1.2 (+0.075). UN sanctions consideration is external accountability mechanism in process.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 1.3 (+0.05). S5 Coalitional Compassion: Switzerland talks indicate coalition formation between DRC and M23 with international facilitation — note this remains contested.
scoring_rationale.INT: 1.3 (+0.05). I1 Consistency: very limited evidence of follow-through on prior commitments; minor uplift only.

math_check.validator_check: +1.5 sub-threshold; Critical band sustained. Per scanner staleness +1.5 from rotation update reflects modest in-window positive trajectory. Within validator 2.0pt cycle ceiling.

negativeSignals: HRW-documented aid blockage; aid-agency suspensions; staff killings; 7M+ displaced; Burundian troop deployment; Doha framework provisions unresolved.
positiveSignals: April 19 Switzerland-talks commitment to civilian protection and aid deliveries; UNSC engagement; peace monitoring framework discussion.
sector_context: DRC sits in conflict-cluster alongside Sudan, South Sudan, Myanmar — the only one with a positive in-window trajectory signal (Switzerland talks). This distinguishes DRC from floor-cluster countries and supports the Critical-band composite remaining above floor.
open_actions_resolved: HRW April 14 evidence captured under AWR/ACT/BND
April 19 Switzerland-talks commitment captured under BND/ACT positive signal
open_actions_carried: Monitor whether Switzerland-talks commitment translates to operational change
Monitor for sanctions decisions on abusive commanders
Re-queue for full assessment if humanitarian access restoration is documented
